chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-537 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing/Priority 1. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 4 as at “A”. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4488/2025 (Stay). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 14.07.2025 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad Khan Jadoon, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. K.A Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II, CPO Karachi. SIP Muhammad Nawaz Leghari, SHO, P.S Sachal. PI Abdul Rashid, SHO, P.S Sohrab Goth. Father of Petitioner No.1 Khan Afsar present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The case of the petitioners is that they have contracted marriage of free will and they apprehend danger to their lives on account of this un-ceremonial marriage. On notice, Respondent No.6, SHO, P.S Sachal, SHO, P.S Sohrab Goth and Respondent No.4, SDPO East Karachi have filed their replies wherein they have stated that no harassment is caused to the petitioners and they have undertook to provide protection to the petitioners as and when required. Respondent No.7, who is father of the petitioner No.1 Mst. Aliya, is present and submits that after the marriage, the petitioners had approached him and he has compromised the matter with them and he has no objection with the marriage solemnized by the petitioners. He undertakes that he shall not take law in his hands. The official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners as and when required. The petition is disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
